programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam makes Rebecca jealous in many strange ways by telling her that he scored with Robin's other girl friend, and Woody is flabbergasted when a girl answers his ad for a roommate.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon creates a scientific procedure for making friends.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: After surviving the destruction of Isla Nubla, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing took in young Maisie Lockwood. They've been living under the radar to protect Maisie, but she feels like a prisoner. When Maisie goes missing, Owen and Claire set out to find her, and eventually confront Lewis Dodgson, owner of Biosyn. Paleobotanist Ellie Sattler, Paleontologist Alan Grant, and Chaotician Ian Malcolm set out to expose Dodgson's schemes.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: What's happened since the last time Gordon was here?

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: Will Jamie and Adam find Jimmy Hoffa, who is allegedly buried in concrete? Can the power and force of a 737 launch a taxicab 75 feet in the air? Is the daddy longlegs the most venomous spider?
